rule_metadata.name: backdoor
rule_metadata.author: Antonio Sanchez <asanchez@koodous.com>
rule_metadata.description: This rule detects fake samples with a backdoor/dropper

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule backdoor : dropper
{
	meta:
		author = "Antonio Sanchez <asanchez@koodous.com>"
		description = "This rule detects fake samples with a backdoor/dropper"
		sample = "0c3bc51952c71e5bb05c35346005da3baa098faf3911b9b45c3487844de9f539"
		source = "https://koodous.com/rulesets/1765"

	condition:
		androguard.url( "http://sys.wksnkys7.com" ) or androguard.url ( "http://sys.hdyfhpoi.com" ) or androguard.url ( "http://sys.syllyq1n.com" ) or androguard.url ( "http://sys.aedxdrcb.com" ) or androguard.url ( "http://sys.aedxdrcb.com" )
}
